arts.ttl: Wales and Republic of Ireland set up tense second leg after stalemate in Cardiff
arts.sum: The Aviva Stadium will host the second leg on Tuesday, with the winner progressing to next summer’s European Championship in Switzerland.

arts.ttl: Frank Lampard still has plenty to prove - but Coventry decision isn't what it seems
arts.sum: Frank Lampard has finally landed his first role since the end of his chastening second spell at Chelsea, but the backlash to him landing the Coventry job is harsh

arts.ttl: Fresh details emerge over Coventry City’s Viktor Gyokeres sell-on clause amid €4m bonus revelation
arts.sum: Coventry City have seen their Viktor Gyokeres sell-on clause drop from 15% to 10% after being paid €4m… The post Fresh details emerge over Coventry City’s Viktor Gyokeres sell-on clause amid €4m bonus revelation appeared first on The72 - Football League News.

arts.ttl: Frank Lampard has first Coventry City assignment ahead of January transfer window
arts.sum: The Sky Blues chairman has appointed Chelsea great Lampard as the club's new head coach this week, a role in which he replaces the outgoing Mark Robins after an extensive process. Frank Lampard will firstly assess exactly what he inheriting as the new boss of Coventry City before the subject of the January transfer window is seriously explored, says Doug King.

arts.ttl: Doug King addresses Harry Redknapp claims which emerged in Coventry City manager hunt
arts.sum: Doug King has reiterated that there was no contact or influence from Harry Redknapp when it came to choosing Frank Lampard as Mark Robins' successor at Coventry City. If you think I'm going to be influenced when making such a big decision, by external people...everybody has got an opinion.

arts.ttl: Mason-Clark in: Coventry City team news and predicted XI for Frank Lampard’s first game vs Cardiff City
arts.sum: The latest Coventry City team news as Frank Lampard's side gear up to face Cardiff City in the Championship. The post Mason-Clark in: Coventry City team news and predicted XI for Frank Lampard’s first game vs Cardiff City appeared first on The72 - Football League News.

arts.ttl: Viktor Gyokeres sell-on clarity as Coventry City await transfer update
arts.sum: City sold him last year for £17m but they're likely to financially benefit again if Sporting see fit to part with their prized asset at any stage, because a sell-on was agreed when the original move was being negotiated. Coventry City chairman Doug King has confirmed that the club did indeed insert a sell-on clause into the deal which saw Viktor Gyokeres swap the Sky Blues for Sporting Lisbon in the summer of 2023.

arts.ttl: Coventry vs Cardiff predictions: Bluebirds can bounce back
arts.sum: Coventry take on Cardiff at the CBS Arena in the Championship on Saturday and Dan Childs anticipates a close game with the visitors taking at least a share of the points.

Goalkeeper Sam Jones also discussed the fixture, adding: “It was a good opportunity for the boys to get minutes in the cup after not having a game for a few weeks, and I thought everyone reacted well and showed a positive reaction to get back into the game. Ahead of the match, head coach Tom Hutton said: “The game on Saturday against Portsmouth was difficult, but a lot of that was down to the weather.

arts.ttl: How Frank Lampard has put in the hard yards to be ready for Coventry City challenge
arts.sum: I’ve had dinners with Thomas Frank and Roy Hodgson, people I have a lot of respect for as managers. Get the latest Coventry City news sent straight to your phone by joining our Sky Blues WhatsApp group.
